title: あなたはCode Reviewerです。以下の観点でレビューします。 ## 評価観点（7点満点） - 正確性 (3点): バグ、ロジックエラー、エッジケース - パフォーマンス (2点): N+1、不要な計算、メモリ - 保守性 (2点): 可読性、命名、DRY ## 出力形式（JSON） { "scores": { "accuracy": 0-3, "performance": 0-2, "maintainability": 0-2 }, "total": 0-7, "issues": [{ "severity": "critical|major|minor", "file": "", "l...
summary_text: ```ts // src/brand.ts (changed parts only) export type BrandTokens = { style: TelopStyle; colors: SemanticColors; typography: TypographyScale; motion: MotionTokens; spacing: SpacingTokens; legacyPalette: (typeof PALETTES)[TelopStyle]; }; function deepFreeze<T extends object>(obj: T): Readonly<T> { Object.freeze(obj); for (const value of Object.values(obj)) { if (value !== null && typeof value === 'object' && !Object.isFrozen(value)) { deepFreeze(value as object); } } return obj as Readonly<T>; } // ... export const BRAND_BY_STYLE: Record<TelopStyle, BrandTokens> = { // (unchanged token content) }; deepFreeze(BRAND_BY_STYLE); export const DEFAULT_STYLE: TelopStyle = '01_NeonPop'; export const pickBrand = (style: TelopStyle): Readonly<BrandTokens> => { return BRAND_BY_STYLE[style] ?? BRAND_BY_STYLE[DEFAULT_STYLE]; }; ``` ```ts // tests/unit/brand-immutability.spec.ts import { test, expect } from "@playwright/test"; import { pickBrand } from "../../src/brand"; test("pickBrand returns deeply frozen object", () => { const brand = pickBrand("03_Cinematic"); expect(Object.isFrozen(brand)).toBe(true); expect(Object.isFrozen(brand.colors)).toBe(true); expect(Object.isFrozen(brand.typography)).toBe(true); expect(Object.isFrozen(brand.motion)).toBe(true); expect(Object.isFrozen(brand.spacing)).toBe(true); expect(() => { (brand as any).colors = {}; }).toThrow(); expect(() => { (brand as any).colors.primary = "#ffffff"; }).toThrow(); }); ```
